title: 01992_Learning_Signed_Distance_Functions_from_Noisy_3D_Point_Clouds_via_Noise_to_Noise_Mapping
positive_examples: Improves surface reconstruction accuracy from noisy point clouds, which can enhance applications in virtual reality and augmented reality.
Facilitates better point cloud denoising, leading to cleaner data for various 3D applications, including autonomous driving and robotics.
